executives.name: Gary Dickerson
executives.background: Gary E. Dickerson has been President and Chief Executive Officer of Applied Materials since September 2013 and a member of the Board of Directors since June 2013. Prior to joining Applied, he served as Chief Executive Officer of Varian Semiconductor Equipment Associates, Inc. from 2004 until its acquisition by Applied in 2011. He also spent 18 years at KLA-Tencor Corporation in various leadership roles.

executives.name: Brice Hill
executives.background: Brice Hill is Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of Applied Materials, joining in March 2022. He previously served as Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of Xilinx, Inc. and spent 25 years at Intel Corporation in various finance and strategy leadership positions.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer

executives.name: Omkaram Nalamasu
executives.background: Dr. Omkaram Nalamasu is Senior Vice President and Chief Technology Officer. He joined Applied in 2006 and has held various leadership roles in the company's research and development organizations. He is also President of Applied Ventures, LLC.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President and Chief Technology Officer

executives.name: Prabu Raja
executives.background: Dr. Prabu Raja is President of the Semiconductor Products Group. He has been with Applied Materials since 1995 and has held numerous leadership positions in the semiconductor business units.

executives.name: Terrell Spears
executives.background: Terrell Spears is Senior Vice President, Global Operations and Corporate Quality. He joined Applied in 2008 and has led various manufacturing and supply chain organizations.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President, Global Operations and Corporate Quality

board_of_directors.name: Thomas Iannotti
board_of_directors.background: Thomas Iannotti has been Chairman of the Board since 2017 and a director since 2011. He was previously Senior Vice President and General Manager, Enterprise Services at Hewlett-Packard Company.

board_of_directors.name: Gary Dickerson
board_of_directors.background: President and CEO of Applied Materials. See executive profile for details.

board_of_directors.name: Judy Bruner
board_of_directors.background: Judy Bruner was Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of SanDisk Corporation from 2004 until its acquisition by Western Digital in 2016.

board_of_directors.name: Aart de Geus
board_of_directors.background: Dr. de Geus is the co-founder and Executive Chair of Synopsys, Inc. He has served as Synopsys' CEO or co-CEO from 1994 to 2023.

board_of_directors.name: Rani Borkar
board_of_directors.background: Rani Borkar is Corporate Vice President, Azure Hardware Systems and Infrastructure at Microsoft Corporation. She previously held leadership roles at Intel and IBM.

board_of_directors.name: Yvonne McGill
board_of_directors.background: Yvonne McGill is Chief Financial Officer of Dell Technologies Inc. She has held various finance leadership positions at Dell since 1997.

board_of_directors.name: Scott McGregor
board_of_directors.background: Scott McGregor was President and CEO of Broadcom Corporation from 2005 to 2016. He also served as President and CEO of the Philips Semiconductors division of Royal Philips Electronics.
